name: dispatching-parallel-agents
tagline: Guides dispatching independent subagents in parallel to investigate/fix unrelated failures instead of working sequentially.
verdict: Safe, well-built workflow skill: no security exposure of any kind, clear triggers and explicit negative triggers, concrete agent-prompt example and a worked real-world case. Minor gaps: the agent return format is only loosely specified ('a summary'), post-integration failure handling (full suite still red) isn't addressed, and there is no version/changelog.

highlights.summary: Agent output only specified as 'Summary of what you found and what you fixed' (line 112); no fields or structure defined.
Verification section covers spot-checking agent summaries but never addresses what to do if the full suite is still red after integration.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
